title: Still Handy?
summary:
Main
Image reference: iStock-1155718700.jpg | assets/2025-08-18_still-handy_img_istock-1155718700_fabb1516784c.jpg
The Handy tanker market continues to shrink. This has been an ongoing trend for many years, which was rapidly accelerated by the conflict in Ukraine. With spot fixtures in the Baltic and the Black Sea going from around a third of total fixtures to less than 10% each year since 2023, Handies had to find demand elsewhere.
